description:
You are an IPM scout. Document a spray day and reconcile records in farmOS Field Kit.

1. Create an Observation log named 'Rootworm damage assessment - Field 12' dated October 8, 2025, 7:00 AM. Notes: 'Rootworm beetle counts averaged 8.2 per plant across 20 sites. Root damage 0.75 Iowa State node-injury scale. Lodging rows 22-38. 12 percent stand loss. Economic threshold exceeded.' Mark as NOT done.

2. Create an Input log named 'Bifenthrin 2EC application - Field 12' dated October 8, 2025, 10:00 AM. Notes: 'Bifenthrin 2EC EPA Reg 279-3206 at 6.4 fl oz per acre ground sprayer 15 GPA. Wind 5 mph SW 82F. REI 12 hours PHI 30 days. Applicator J Hansen License MC-2847.' Mark as Done.

3. Open 'Rootworm damage assessment - Field 12' from the tasks list. Append to its notes: ' TREATMENT APPLIED see Bifenthrin 2EC log. Re-scout 10-14 days.' Mark it as Done. Save.

4. Create an Activity log named 'Sprayer decontamination and storage' dated October 8, 2025, 1:30 PM. Notes: 'Triple rinse per EPA guidelines. Rinsate applied to treated field. Replaced TeeJet XR11003 nozzles boom section 4.' Mark as Done.

5. Open the navigation menu. Enter server URL 'cropguard.iastate.edu/farmos', username 'j.hansen', password 'Sc0ut2025!'. Do NOT tap Log In.

6. Disable 'Share My Location' in the navigation menu.
